TRIAL RESET TO NOV-20-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-25-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFFS EILEEN RICHEY AND MARK CAPLIN ARE PRESENT. EFRAT LEVY, ESQ. ATTEMPTED TO APPEAR VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM FOR DEFENDANT GREEN PLANET REMODELING INC. MS. LEVY WAS INFORMED THAT AN ATTORNEY IS NOT PERMITTED TO APPEAR IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT FOR A DEFENDANT, AND THAT THE DEFENDANT DID NOT OBTAIN AUTHORIZATION FROM THE COURT TO PARTICIPATE VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MINUTES FOR MAR-27-2024 9:30 AM

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2024 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC-05-2023 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.
